scope_note: Draft literature matrix. The abstract_summary fields are concise paraphrased summaries for writing support, not verbatim abstracts.
peerj_format_note: All entries are mirrored in paper/bib/references.bib and can be cited from the PeerJ-style manuscript draft.

references.title: {LoRA}: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
references.abstract_summary: Introduces low-rank adapter matrices for adapting large language models while keeping base weights frozen.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Inject trainable low-rank updates into selected linear layers to reduce trainable parameters and memory cost.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.

references.title: {QLoRA}: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized {LLMs}
references.venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
references.abstract_summary: Shows that quantized base models can be fine-tuned efficiently while retaining strong downstream performance.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Combine 4-bit quantization, paged optimizers, and LoRA adapters for memory-efficient fine-tuning.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.

references.title: Lessons from the Trenches on Reproducible Evaluation of Language Models
references.abstract_summary: Discusses practical lessons for reproducible language model evaluation across tasks and frameworks.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Standardize task definitions, prompts, metrics, and evaluation reporting for comparable model assessment.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.

references.title: Measuring Massive Multitask Language Understanding
references.abstract_summary: Defines a broad multitask benchmark for measuring language understanding across academic domains.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Evaluate models through many multiple-choice subject tests that probe knowledge and reasoning.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.

references.title: Training Verifiers to Solve Math Word Problems
references.abstract_summary: Introduces a grade-school math word-problem benchmark for reasoning evaluation.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Use verifier-oriented math problems and exact-match answer scoring.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.

references.title: Evaluating Large Language Models Trained on Code
references.abstract_summary: Presents a code-generation benchmark based on functional correctness of generated programs.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Measure pass@k on programming problems with unit tests.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.

references.title: {C-Eval}: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
references.venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
references.abstract_summary: Introduces a Chinese multitask evaluation suite across subjects and difficulty levels.
references.main_method_or_contribution: Measure multiple-choice accuracy on Chinese exams and professional subject categories.
references.relevance_to_this_paper: Supports the resource-constrained LLM evaluation, adaptation, deployment, or model-family framing of the manuscript.
